charity.s: Limited public information available on charitable giving. Company acquired by Coca-Cola in 2001 and subsequently by Full Sail IP Partners in 2021. Early CSR efforts focused on crisis management following 1996 E. coli outbreak; company donated $250,000 to food safety research as part of legal settlement.

environment.s: Mixed environmental record. Company converted delivery trucks to compressed natural gas in 1997 and won Clean Air Award from American Lung Association. However, faced criticism for environmental impact of packaging and distribution practices under Coca-Cola ownership. Products contained high sugar content and company criticized for moving away from sustainable ingredients.

labor.s: Early stage had progressive labor practices with employee empowerment programs, product benefits, and hands-on management approach. However, company faced challenges after Coca-Cola acquisition which prioritized mass production. Coca-Cola's 2020 discontinuation led to 300 job layoffs. No major OSHA or NLRB violations publicly documented.

animals.s: Not applicable to juice and beverage manufacturing operations.

guns.s: Not applicable to juice and beverage manufacturing operations.
